mapper.sql: id, user_id, target_type, target_id, folder_id, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into favorite (user_id, target_type, target_id, folder_id, created_at) values (#{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{folder_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into favorite
user_id,
target_type,
target_id,
folder_id,
created_at,
#{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{folder_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update favorite
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
target_type = #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
target_id = #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
folder_id = #{folder_id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update favorite set user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, target_type = #{target_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_id = #{target_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, folder_id = #{folder_id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
